comment:
For those are wondering(copy&paste) 

Wonwoo will appear in any pre-recorded content before his enlistment. These episodes are pre-recorded way back early this year. Most of these episodes are recorded way further before the any of the schedules releases. The Going Seventeen 2025 episodes are not released by order of filming dates. 

Seventeen is very very busy with tight schedules for a complex big group. Currently they preparing for the upcoming world tour 'New_ ', unit releases and other schedules lately. Most of schedules and actives are managed months/years ahead with unforeseen incidents cases.

If Jun or The8 are absent any of  the released Seventeen 2025, mostly reasons are because of busy schedules or filming in China.

It's normal for Going Seventeen to be missing 1 member for filming in the past. In the past, S.Coups who missed the most Going Seventeen filming for his Hiatus in 2019 - early 2020 and Aug 2023 - mid 2024.
Past smaller hiatus, absent for Going Seventeen filming are Jeonghan, Seungkwan, Wonwoo, China line - Jun and Th8 missed for some part during covid era and busy with China filming actives. Other member have occasionally missed 1 ep or 2. Most reasons for missing members are typically Health, Mourning, family and filming conflicting schedules in past. Obviously there has been more OT13 Going SVT filmed in the past. SVT has entered it's military enlistment era since Sept 2024.

Pledis/HYBE and Going Team would probably decide what episodes are best for timely release. My personal opinion, is that they released MC BOO’s Dangerous Invitation for the refreshing Summer vibes during Summer time in Korea before any other early pre-recorded episodes. 

Another example, Wonwoo pre-recorded song was released in 17th July on his Bday. 
SVT held Cartland 2025 in outdoor stadium venue even during very cold weather, early compared to normal scheduling time which is typically later in the year to include Wonwoo for  Cartland before his enlistment. 

SVT will have to apply and take exam for mandatory military enlistment when they can, they will not know which month/date they will be drafted until Military announces it later on. That's why Hoshi and Woozi were surprised to find out they will have to draft only in September much later than they anticipated, so they quickly arranged 'WARNING' Fan concert and other schedules before enlistment. It was mentioned Wonwoo draft date was much early than anticipated so they quickly arranged Caratland 2025 to include him if my memory serves right.

SVT/Pledis/HYBE team would have to manage logistics and reasons  for scheduling actives especially because they are very complex group, one the largest number 13 member boy group, who are strongly active in schedules and music/performance consistently since debut, that have to take in account of multi nationals members, various cases injuries, enlistment and other factors when managing scheduling actives and releases.
